Running team is `pr5-review` (PR #5 review). Four reviewer agents are active: tokens-reviewer, feature-reviewer, tooling-reviewer, refactor-reviewer, coordinated by team-lead.

This session isn't the team lead and can't literally join as a peer — each team has one lead session (`bfea6233-36cd-4dd2-b687-5a34c4897417`). A few things I can do instead:

1. **Send a message to team-lead** on your behalf (e.g., ask for status, request shutdown)
2. **Read the live task list and findings** from `~/.claude/tasks/pr5-review/` and relay progress
3. **Resume the team-lead session** — that requires launching Claude with `--resume bfea6233-36cd-4dd2-b687-5a34c4897417`, which I can't do from inside this session

Which of these did you mean? If it's option 3, run `! claude --resume bfea6233-36cd-4dd2-b687-5a34c4897417` in the prompt.
